tool_args.label: Bx6 South Bronx Crosstown Select Bus Service

payload.project_name: Bx6 South Bronx Crosstown Select Bus Service
payload.description: Proposed SBS along the Bx6 South Bronx Crosstown corridor with dedicated bus lanes, off-board fare collection, and traffic signal priority
Bx6 local stops at every stop, complementing the Bx6 SBS service

The Bx6 South Bronx corridor was identified as a potential candidate for Select Bus Service in the 2009 Bus Rapid Transit Phase II Study. The corridor spans from Washington Heights (Riverside Dr W) to Hunts Point (Farragut St).
Proposed bus lanes on the Bx6 corridor from Washington Heights to Hunts Point Cooperative Market
payload.location_text: Washington Heights to Hunts Point Cooperative Market via 163rd Street

normalized_location.raw_text: Washington Heights to Hunts Point Cooperative Market via 163rd Street

payload.description: Install fare machines at SBS stops

tool_args.label: Traffic Signal Priority at Simpson St/Southern Blvd

payload.description: Proposed traffic signal timing adjustment for the intersection of Simpson St, 163rd St, and Southern Blvd. Add ~3 seconds of green time for the 163rd St bus lane. Right-turns allowed from bus lane.
payload.location_text: Simpson St, 163rd St, and Southern Blvd intersection

normalized_location.raw_text: Simpson St, 163rd St, and Southern Blvd intersection

tool_args.label: Replace cobblestone at Hunts Point bus stops

payload.description: Replace cobblestone at three Hunts Point Av bus stops: Garrison Av Eastbound, Gilbert Pl Eastbound, Seneca Av Westbound

tool_args.label: Existing eastbound curbside bus lane on 161st St

payload.subject: Bx6 SBS outreach

tool_args.label: Alternative 1 (Two-Way Bus Tunnel): most beneficial for 25,000 daily bus riders

payload.claim_text: Most beneficial for 25,000 daily bus riders. Straightforward design for drivers. Traffic works eastbound at Sheridan Ave. Traffic would experience more delays westbound at Sheridan Ave.
payload.subject: Alternative 1: Two-Way Bus Tunnel

tool_args.label: Alternative 2 (One-Way Bus Tunnel): beneficial for 25,000 daily bus riders

payload.claim_text: Beneficial for 25,000 daily bus riders. No significant traffic impacts. Addresses boarding issue in front of courts.
payload.subject: Alternative 2: One-Way Bus Tunnel
